semantic.role: Integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI tool, validating end-to-end execution via child processes.
responsibilities: Spawning the built CLI binary with controlled arguments and capturing stdout/stderr/exit status.
Setting up temporary directories and git repositories for testing CLI behavior in isolated environments.
Providing reusable test utilities (e.g., `runCli`, `writeWrapperScript`) for CLI integration tests.
outOfScope: Unit testing of internal CLI logic or module internals.
Production API surface; all exports are test-internal and never consumed by external modules.
Any runtime behavior outside the test harness.
invariants: Must be located in a file ending with .test.ts or .spec.ts (per architectural rule 'test-file-suffix').
Imports must remain internal to the test framework and child_process; no production dependencies beyond those allowed for testing.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, isolated integration test harness for the CLI, ensuring that command-line interactions are verified against the built artifact.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The commit 'fix: resolve ESLint errors, E2E prompt injection, and better-sqlite3 compat' likely addressed test reliability or tooling compatibility, but no direct evidence of change in this file.
